<target state="translated">V tomhle řešení chybí některé balíčky NuGet. Kliknutím je obnovíte z online zdrojů balíčků.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Je dostupná nová verze správce balíčků NuGet.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Implicitně odkazováno ze sady SDK. Pokud chcete balíček aktualizovat, aktualizujte sadu SDK, do které patří.</target>
<target state="translated">Einige NuGet-Pakete fehlen in dieser Projektmappe. Klicken Sie, um eine Wiederherstellung aus Ihren Onlinepaketquellen auszuführen.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Eine neue Version des NuGet-Paket-Managers ist verfügbar.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Wird ausdrücklich von einem SDK referenziert. Um das Paket zu aktualisieren, aktualisieren Sie das zugehörige SDK.</target>
<target state="translated">Faltan algunos paquetes NuGet en esta solución. Haga clic para restaurar desde los orígenes del paquete en línea.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Hay disponible una nueva versión del Administrador de paquetes NuGet.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Con referencia implícita mediante un SDK. Para actualizar el paquete, actualice el SDK al que pertenece.</target>
<target state="translated">Certains packages NuGet sont absents de cette solution. Cliquez pour effectuer une restauration à partir de vos sources de package en ligne.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Une nouvelle version du Gestionnaire de package NuGet est disponible.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Référencé implicitement par un SDK. Pour mettre à jour le package, mettez à jour le SDK auquel il appartient.</target>
<target state="translated">In questa soluzione mancano alcuni pacchetti NuGet. Fare clic per ripristinarli dalle origini dei pacchetti online.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">È disponibile una nuova versione di Gestione pacchetti NuGet.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Un SDK vi fa riferimento in modo implicito. Per aggiornare il pacchetto, aggiornare l'SDK a cui appartiene.</target>
<target state="translated">このソリューションに一部の NuGet パッケージが見つかりません。クリックするとオンライン パッケージ ソースから復元します。</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">新しいバージョンの NuGet パッケージ マネージャーを利用できます。</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">SDK によって暗黙的に参照されています。パッケージを更新するには、参照元になっている SDK を更新します。</target>
<target state="translated">이 솔루션에서 일부 NuGet 패키지가 누락되었습니다. 온라인 패키지 소스에서 복원하려면 클릭하십시오.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">새 버전의 NuGet 패키지 관리자를 사용할 수 있습니다.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">SDK에서 암시적으로 참조됩니다. 패키지를 업데이트하려면 패키지가 속한 SDK를 업데이트하세요.</target>
<target state="translated">W tym rozwiązaniu brakuje niektórych pakietów NuGet. Kliknij, aby przywrócić je ze źródeł pakietów online.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Dostępna jest nowa wersja menedżera pakietów NuGet.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Niejawnie przywoływane przez zestaw SDK. Aby zaktualizować pakiet, zaktualizuj zestaw SDK, do którego on należy.</target>
<target state="translated">Alguns pacotes do NuGet não estão presentes nesta solução. Clique para restaurar usando as origens do pacote online.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Uma nova versão do Gerenciador de Pacotes do NuGet está disponível.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">Referenciado implicitamente por um SDK. Para atualizar o pacote, atualize o SDK ao qual ele pertence.</target>
<target state="translated">В этом решении отсутствует несколько пакетов NuGet. Щелкните, чтобы восстановить их из источников пакетов в сети.</target>
-        <source>A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.</source>
-        <target state="translated">Доступна новая версия диспетчера пакетов NuGet.</target>
<source>Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.</source>
<target state="translated">На этот пакет неявно ссылается пакет SDK. Чтобы обновить пакет, обновите пакет SDK, к которому принадлежит этот пакет.</target>
